subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath turned towards Our horizon, hearkened unto Our call, been drawn by Our verses, and voiced Our praise amidst men [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن اقبل الی افقی و سمع ندائی و انجذب بایاتی و نطق بثنائی بین
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @praise and encouragement, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @suffering and imprisonment
